paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: PaLM introduces a scalable language modeling framework using Pathways, a new ML system enabling efficient training across thousands of TPU chips. The model leverages SwiGLU activation, parallel layers, multi-query attention, and RoPE embeddings to enhance performance and training efficiency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 780 billion tokens of high-quality text, including filtered webpages, books, Wikipedia, news articles, source code, and social media conversations
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, few-shot learning, reasoning, multilingual tasks, code generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language modeling with improved few-shot learning and reasoning capabilities
raw_extraction.extension: Uses SwiGLU activation, parallel layers, multi-query attention, and RoPE embeddings
